chapter_title.en: Chapter on Advance Payment in Food, Animals, and Other Goods

text: 3942 - وَ - سَأَلَهُ سَمَاعَةُ : عَنِ اَلرَّهْنِ يُرْهِنُهُ اَلرَّجُلُ فِي سَلَمٍ إِذَا أَسْلَمَ فِي طَعَامٍ أَوْ مَتَاعٍ أَوْ حَيَوَانٍ فَقَالَ "لاَ بَأْسَ بِأَنْ تَسْتَوْثِقَ مِنْ مَالِكَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3942 - Sama'ah asked him about a pledge (rahn) that a man gives as security in a salam transaction when he advances payment for food, goods, or animals.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in securing your wealth."
